title: 1. I found the visualizations visually appealing. (1 -> not appealing, 7 -> appealing)
2. I trust the system. (1 -> untrust, 7 -> trust)
3. I can rely on the system. (1 -> can not rely, 7 -> can rely)
4. How much mental and perceptual activity was required? Was the task easy or demanding, simple or complex, extracting or forgiving? (1 -> low, 20 -> high)
